recommendations.title: The Thin Blue Line
recommendations.overview: This unique documentary dramatically re-enacts the crime scene and investigation of a police officer's murder in Dallas.

recommendations.title: Tabloid
recommendations.overview: A documentary on a former Miss Wyoming who is charged with abducting and imprisoning a young Mormon Missionary.

recommendations.title: Gates of Heaven
recommendations.overview: A documentary about a pet cemetery in California, and the people who have pets buried there.

recommendations.title: A Brief History of Time
recommendations.overview: This shows physicist Stephen Hawking's life as he deals with the ALS that renders him immobile and unable to speak without the use of a computer. Hawking's friends, family, classmates, and peers are interviewed not only about his theories but the man

recommendations.title: Hacksaw Ridge
recommendations.overview: WWII American Army Medic Desmond T. Doss, who served during the Battle of Okinawa, refuses to kill people and becomes the first Conscientious Objector in American history to receive the Congressional Medal of Honor.

recommendations.title: They Shall Not Grow Old
recommendations.overview: A documentary about World War I with never-before-seen footage to commemorate the centennial of Armistice Day, and the end of the war.

recommendations.title: Glory
recommendations.overview: Robert Gould Shaw leads the US Civil War's first all-black volunteer company, fighting prejudices of both his own Union army and the Confederates.

recommendations.title: The Round Up
recommendations.overview: A faithful retelling of the 1942 "Vel' d'Hiv Roundup" and the events surrounding it.

recommendations.title: Schumacher
recommendations.overview: Through exclusive interviews and archival footage, this documentary traces an intimate portrait of seven-time Formula 1 champion Michael Schumacher.
recommendations.director: Hanns-Bruno Kammertöns, Vanessa Nöcker, Michael Wech

recommendations.title: The Ascent
recommendations.overview: During a freezing WWII winter, two Soviet partisans on a mission to gather food contend with the temperature, the occupying Germans, and their own psyches.
